parameters.content:
## 03 | Content Performance Analyzer
Runs daily at 6 AM. Fetches your own content stats across TikTok, YouTube, and Instagram. Calculates performance scores and optimal posting times. Stores results in Notion.

**Env vars needed:**
- RAPIDAPI_KEY
- MY_TIKTOK_USERNAME
- YOUTUBE_API_KEY, YOUTUBE_CHANNEL_ID
- INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN
- NOTION_API_KEY, NOTION_PERFORMANCE_DB
